title: VEMA-147 I Participated In A 3-Day, 2-Night Creampie School Trip With The Goal Of Fucking My Colossal Tits Female Teacher Chitose Yuki - Chitose Yura
description: Chitose, the homeroom teacher, was the reason why Ishii, a troublesome person who did not attend school, participated in the school trip. A plump body that I can not think of as a teacher. At this opportunity, I was planning to make something with Chitose's body alone. At that time, Chitose came to the room to persuade Ishii who didn't come to school. "It's not just about studying at school. Why don't you come here little by little?" "Then ... please tell me something other than studying ..." It was the limit of my patience. Ishii begins to massage Chitose's big tits full of gaps ...
